title: Patient can sign up successfully and land on dashboard
description: Verifies a new patient can complete signup with valid details and is redirected into the dashboard.

steps.description: Type "Test Patient" into the full name field
Type "1990-01-15" into the date of birth field
Type "ValidPass!234" into the confirm password field

title: Signup shows error when confirm password does not match
description: Verifies password mismatch is detected and signup is blocked with a visible validation message.

steps.description: Type "Mismatch User" into the full name field
Type "DifferentPass!234" into the confirm password field

title: Signup requires full name
description: Verifies the form blocks submission and shows a visible validation error when full name is missing.

steps.description: Type "1992-05-10" into the date of birth field
Type "ValidPass!234" into the confirm password field

title: Signup requires email
description: Verifies the form blocks submission and shows a visible validation error when email is missing.

steps.description: Type "No Email User" into the full name field
Type "1995-08-20" into the date of birth field
Type "ValidPass!234" into the confirm password field

title: Signup rejects invalid email format
description: Verifies an invalid email address triggers a visible validation error and prevents signup.

steps.description: Type "Invalid Email User" into the full name field
Type "1991-03-12" into the date of birth field
Type "ValidPass!234" into the confirm password field

title: Signup requires password
description: Verifies the form blocks submission and shows a visible validation error when password is missing.

steps.description: Type "No Password User" into the full name field
Type "1994-11-02" into the date of birth field
Type "ValidPass!234" into the confirm password field

title: Signup requires confirm password
description: Verifies the form blocks submission and shows a visible validation error when confirm password is missing.

steps.description: Type "No Confirm User" into the full name field
Type "1993-09-19" into the date of birth field

title: Signup rejects clearly invalid date of birth input
description: Verifies the date of birth field validation triggers a visible error for an invalid date and prevents signup.

steps.description: Type "Bad DOB User" into the full name field
Type "not-a-date" into the date of birth field
Type "ValidPass!234" into the confirm password field

title: Receptionist signup shows error for invalid staff code
description: Verifies the form blocks registration and shows an error when the staff code is invalid.

steps.description: Type "Test Receptionist" into the name field
Type "WRONG-CODE" into the staff code field

title: Receptionist signup requires name (blank name validation)
description: Verifies the signup form prevents submission when the name field is empty.

steps.description: Type "123456" into the staff code field

title: Receptionist signup requires email (blank email validation)
description: Verifies the signup form prevents submission when the email field is empty.

steps.description: Type "Test Receptionist" into the name field
Type "123456" into the staff code field

title: Receptionist signup validates email format
description: Verifies the form rejects an improperly formatted email address.

steps.description: Type "Test Receptionist" into the name field
Type "123456" into the staff code field

title: Receptionist signup requires staff code (blank staff code validation)
description: Verifies the signup form prevents submission when the staff code field is empty.

steps.description: Type "Test Receptionist" into the name field

title: Receptionist signup requires password (blank password validation)
description: Verifies the signup form prevents submission when the password field is empty.

steps.description: Type "Test Receptionist" into the name field
Type "123456" into the staff code field

title: Doctor sees key dashboard sections on Dashboard Home
description: Verifies that a logged-in doctor can view stats cards, upcoming appointments, engagement charts, and the Live Queue panel on the Dashboard Home.

title: Dashboard stats cards display for authenticated user
description: Verifies that the Dashboard Home shows the three core statistic cards for an authenticated user.

title: Upcoming appointments list is visible on Dashboard Home
description: Verifies that the Dashboard Home includes a visible upcoming appointments section for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Verify element "Upcoming appointments list" is visible

title: Doctor engagement charts are visible on Dashboard Home
description: Verifies that a doctor can see the engagement charts section on the Dashboard Home.

steps.description: Verify element "Patient engagement chart" is visible

title: Dashboard loads without persistent loading spinner
description: Verifies that the Dashboard Home finishes loading and renders dashboard content (not stuck on a spinner).

title: Invalid password prevents access to Dashboard Home
description: Verifies that incorrect credentials do not allow access to the dashboard and show an error on the login page.

title: Unauthorized session shows protected-route handling when attempting dashboard access
description: Verifies that when a session cannot be established, the user is prevented from using the dashboard and is redirected to login or shown a protected-route error.

title: Book a new appointment from Week View as a patient (doctor selection present)
description: Verifies a logged-in user can open the booking modal from Week View and confirm a new appointment that appears in the calendar/list.

title: Open booking modal from a time slot in Week View
description: Verifies clicking a calendar time slot opens the booking modal with expected booking fields visible.

steps.description: Click an available time slot in the calendar grid

title: Confirm booking creates a new appointment entry visible in the appointment list/calendar
description: Verifies confirming a booking in the modal results in a visible new appointment entry.

steps.description: Click an available time slot in the calendar grid

title: Filter appointments by status (Pending)
description: Verifies the appointments list can be filtered to show only pending appointments.

title: View appointment details from the appointments list
description: Verifies an appointment entry can be opened to view its details.

steps.description: Click an appointment entry in the list (not a header row)

title: Doctor updates a pending appointment to Confirmed (if action buttons available)
description: Verifies a doctor can change a pending appointment status to confirmed and see the updated status in UI.

steps.description: Click an appointment entry that shows an "Approve" or "Confirm" action

title: Doctor cancels an appointment and sees Cancelled status
description: Verifies a doctor can cancel an appointment and the UI reflects the cancelled state.

steps.description: Click an appointment entry that shows a "Cancel" action

title: Attempt to confirm booking on an already-taken slot shows conflict/unavailable error
description: Verifies the app prevents booking conflicts and displays a visible error message when the selected slot is unavailable.

steps.description: Click a time slot that is already booked (shows an existing appointment)

title: Open patient details and start creating a prescription from the patient drawer
description: Verifies a doctor can search for a patient, open the details drawer, and launch the prescription creation modal with patient context pre-filled.

steps.description: Click on "Patients" in the dashboard navigation menu
Type "Ann" into the patient search field
Click on the first patient row in the results list
Click the "Create Prescription" button in the patient details drawer

title: Add patient shows validation error when Age is missing
description: Verifies required field validation prevents saving a patient when Age is empty.

steps.description: Click on "Patients" in the dashboard navigation menu
Fill "Test Patient" into the Full Name field

title: Patient search returns matching results and filters the visible list
description: Verifies searching by name narrows down the patient list and shows matching entries.

steps.description: Click on "Patients" in the dashboard navigation menu
Type "a" into the patient search field
Type "zzzz" into the patient search field

title: Open a patient drawer and view medical history section
description: Verifies selecting a patient shows the details drawer with medical history content visible.

steps.description: Click on "Patients" in the dashboard navigation menu
Click on the first patient row in the results list

title: Add notes to a patient record from the details drawer
description: Verifies a doctor can add a note in the patient details view and see it displayed after saving.

steps.description: Click on "Patients" in the dashboard navigation menu
Click on the first patient row in the results list
Fill "Follow-up required in 2 weeks" into the Notes field
Verify text "Follow-up required in 2 weeks" is visible

title: View patient appointments list from within patient details
description: Verifies the patient details drawer exposes an appointments section with visible content.

steps.description: Click on "Patients" in the dashboard navigation menu
Click on the first patient row in the results list

title: View patient prescriptions list from within patient details
description: Verifies the patient details drawer exposes a prescriptions section with visible content.

steps.description: Click on "Patients" in the dashboard navigation menu
Click on the first patient row in the results list

title: Close patient details drawer using the close control
description: Verifies the patient details drawer can be dismissed and the patient list remains visible.

steps.description: Click on "Patients" in the dashboard navigation menu
Click on the first patient row in the results list
Click the "Close" button on the patient details drawer
Verify element "Patient Details" is not visible

title: Save a valid availability schedule for Monday (success confirmation)
description: Verifies a doctor can enable Monday, set a valid start/end time, save, and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "Availability" in the dashboard navigation
Fill a valid start time for "Monday" into the start time field
Fill a valid end time for "Monday" into the end time field

title: Validation error when end time is earlier than start time
description: Verifies the UI blocks saving when an available day has an invalid time range and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Click on "Availability" in the dashboard navigation
Toggle availability for a day to enabled
Fill a start time into the start time field
Fill an end time earlier than the start time into the end time field
Verify text "invalid time range" is visible

title: Save schedule with multiple enabled days (bulk weekly configuration)
description: Verifies a doctor can configure more than one day and save the full weekly schedule successfully.

steps.description: Click on "Availability" in the dashboard navigation
Fill a valid start time for "Monday" into the start time field
Fill a valid end time for "Monday" into the end time field
Fill a valid start time for "Wednesday" into the start time field
Fill a valid end time for "Wednesday" into the end time field

title: Disable a previously enabled day and save (day turned off)
description: Verifies a doctor can turn a day off and successfully save the schedule update.

steps.description: Click on "Availability" in the dashboard navigation

title: Attempt to save with an enabled day missing a start time
description: Verifies the UI prevents saving when a day is enabled but the start time is not provided.

steps.description: Click on "Availability" in the dashboard navigation
Fill a valid end time for "Tuesday" into the end time field

title: Attempt to save with an enabled day missing an end time
description: Verifies the UI prevents saving when a day is enabled but the end time is not provided.

steps.description: Click on "Availability" in the dashboard navigation
Fill a valid start time for "Thursday" into the start time field

title: Saving with no days enabled shows a clear outcome
description: Verifies the UI handles saving an all-disabled schedule by showing a visible success message or a clear validation message.

steps.description: Click on "Availability" in the dashboard navigation
Toggle availability for each day of the week to disabled

title: Availability page loads and displays weekly day controls
description: Verifies the availability management screen renders correctly with day toggles and time inputs visible.

steps.description: Click on "Availability" in the dashboard navigation
Verify element "Save availability schedule" is visible

title: Doctor creates a new prescription and sees it listed
description: Verifies a doctor can create a prescription with medications and instructions and see it appear in the prescriptions list.

steps.description: Click on "Prescriptions" in the dashboard navigation

title: Doctor adds one medication row with full details and saves successfully
description: Verifies the medication row fields accept input and saving shows the prescription in the grid/list.

steps.description: Click on "Prescriptions" in the dashboard navigation
Type "Test Medicine A" into the medication name field

title: Doctor adds complete medication details (dosage, frequency, duration) and instructions then saves
description: Verifies all structured fields can be filled and the saved prescription is visible in the list with expected summary content.

steps.description: Click on "Prescriptions" in the dashboard navigation
Type "Amoxicillin" into the medication name field
Type "3 times daily" into the frequency field

title: Doctor adds instructions and saves; prescription appears in the grid
description: Verifies free-text instructions are persisted and visible after saving.

steps.description: Click on "Prescriptions" in the dashboard navigation
Type "Ibuprofen" into the medication name field
Type "Take with food and plenty of water" into the instructions field

title: Validation: missing medication name shows required-field error on Save
description: Verifies the UI blocks saving when a medication name is missing and displays a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click on "Prescriptions" in the dashboard navigation
Verify text "Medication name is required" is visible

title: Doctor sees newly created prescription listed after Save (no modal remains open)
description: Verifies the create flow completes by returning to the list view and showing the new entry.

steps.description: Click on "Prescriptions" in the dashboard navigation
Type "Cetirizine" into the medication name field

title: Patient can open prescriptions page and view prescriptions list
description: Verifies a patient can access the prescriptions page and see a visible list/grid of prescriptions (even if empty).

steps.description: Click on "Prescriptions" in the dashboard navigation

title: Add a walk-in patient with required name only and see success toast + waitlist update
description: Verifies receptionist can add a walk-in patient to today's queue and immediately sees confirmation and the new entry in the waitlist.

steps.description: Click on "Reception" in the dashboard navigation
Type "Test WalkIn One" into the Patient Name field
Verify text "✓ Test WalkIn One added to the queue!" is visible
Verify text "Test WalkIn One" is visible in the "Waitlist Today" section

title: Add a walk-in patient with optional vitals and see success toast + waitlist update
description: Verifies receptionist can submit a walk-in patient including optional vitals and the patient appears in today's waitlist.

steps.description: Click on "Reception" in the dashboard navigation
Type "Test WalkIn Vitals" into the Patient Name field
Fill "120/80" into the Blood Pressure field
Fill "98" into the Heart Rate field
Verify text "✓ Test WalkIn Vitals added to the queue!" is visible
Verify text "Test WalkIn Vitals" is visible in the "Waitlist Today" section

title: Client-side validation: prevent submit when Patient Name is blank
description: Verifies the receptionist cannot submit a walk-in patient without a required name and sees a visible validation/error message.

steps.description: Click on "Reception" in the dashboard navigation

title: Trim/whitespace handling: name with leading/trailing spaces still succeeds
description: Verifies a patient name with extra whitespace can be submitted and the success toast appears for the resulting name.

steps.description: Click on "Reception" in the dashboard navigation
Type "  Test WalkIn Spaces  " into the Patient Name field
Verify text "added to the queue!" is visible
Verify text "Test WalkIn Spaces" is visible in the "Waitlist Today" section

title: Numeric validation: entering non-numeric values into vitals shows visible error or blocks submit
description: Verifies vitals fields enforce sensible input and the user receives visible feedback when invalid values are entered.

steps.description: Click on "Reception" in the dashboard navigation
Type "Test WalkIn BadVitals" into the Patient Name field
Fill "abc" into the Heart Rate field

title: Error flow: submitting when clinic linking is missing (employer_id is null) shows invalid clinic linking screen
description: Verifies the app shows an error screen with instructions when the receptionist profile is not linked to a clinic.

steps.description: Click on "Reception" in the dashboard navigation
Type "Test WalkIn NoClinic" into the Patient Name field

title: Reception dashboard loads and shows core sections before interacting
description: Verifies the receptionist can reach the Reception Dashboard and see the walk-in form and today's waitlist section.

steps.description: Click on "Reception" in the dashboard navigation

title: Submit a medical question and receive an AI response in the conversation
description: Verifies that a user can ask a medical question and see the assistant response added to conversation history.

steps.description: Click on "Chatbot" in the app navigation
Type "I have a sore throat and mild fever. What should I do?" into the chatbot input field
Verify text "I have a sore throat and mild fever. What should I do?" is visible in the conversation history
Verify an assistant response message is visible in the conversation history

title: Verify auto-scroll keeps the latest assistant message visible after response
description: Verifies the conversation view scrolls to the newest message after a response is received.

steps.description: Click on "Chatbot" in the app navigation
Type "What are common causes of headaches?" into the chatbot input field
Verify an assistant response message is visible in the conversation history
Verify the most recent assistant response is visible without scrolling

title: Prevent empty message submission
description: Verifies the chatbot does not submit an empty prompt and provides visible feedback or remains unchanged.

steps.description: Click on "Chatbot" in the app navigation
Verify no new user message bubble is visible in the conversation history

title: Clear conversation removes prior messages from the view
description: Verifies that the user can clear the chat history using the provided clear control.

steps.description: Click on "Chatbot" in the app navigation
Type "What is a normal adult resting heart rate?" into the chatbot input field
Verify text "What is a normal adult resting heart rate?" is visible in the conversation history
Verify text "What is a normal adult resting heart rate?" is not visible in the conversation history

title: Submitting multiple questions appends messages in order
description: Verifies that the conversation history retains earlier exchanges and adds new ones sequentially.

steps.description: Click on "Chatbot" in the app navigation
Type "What are symptoms of dehydration?" into the chatbot input field
Verify text "What are symptoms of dehydration?" is visible in the conversation history
Type "When should I see a doctor for it?" into the chatbot input field
Verify text "When should I see a doctor for it?" is visible in the conversation history
Verify an assistant response message is visible after the second question

title: Keyboard submission sends the message (Enter to submit)
description: Verifies that pressing Enter in the chat input submits the message and adds it to the conversation history.

steps.description: Click on "Chatbot" in the app navigation
Type "Is it safe to take ibuprofen on an empty stomach?" into the chatbot input field
Verify text "Is it safe to take ibuprofen on an empty stomach?" is visible in the conversation history
Verify an assistant response message is visible in the conversation history

title: Open Settings modal from Dashboard header
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the Settings modal from the dashboard header.

steps.description: Click the Settings icon in the header

title: Update profile name and phone successfully
description: Verifies a user can update profile name and phone in Settings and sees a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Click the Settings icon in the header
Fill "Test User Updated" into the name field

title: Updated profile values remain visible after saving
description: Verifies that after saving, the Settings modal displays the updated name and phone values.

steps.description: Click the Settings icon in the header
Fill "Test User Persist" into the name field
Verify text "Test User Persist" is visible

title: Attempt to save profile with empty required name
description: Verifies the UI prevents saving when the name field is empty and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click the Settings icon in the header

title: Toggle dark/light theme from Settings
description: Verifies the user can toggle the theme setting and sees a visible indication of the selected theme option.

steps.description: Click the Settings icon in the header

title: Manage notification preferences and save
description: Verifies the user can change a notification preference and save with a visible confirmation.

steps.description: Click the Settings icon in the header
Click a notification preference toggle to change its state

title: Change password and handle save failure with visible error
description: Verifies that when a password change cannot be saved, an error message is shown indicating the changes could not be saved.

steps.description: Click the Settings icon in the header
Fill "WrongOldPass123!" into the current password field
Fill "NewPass123!" into the new password field
Verify text "could not be saved" is visible

title: Change password with mismatched confirmation shows validation error
description: Verifies the UI blocks password change when new password and confirmation do not match, showing a visible validation error.

steps.description: Click the Settings icon in the header
Fill "NewPass123!" into the new password field
Fill "DifferentPass123!" into the confirm password field
Verify text "do not match" is visible

title: Logout from Dashboard home redirects to Login and shows login form
description: Verifies a signed-in user can log out from the dashboard header and is redirected to the login page with the login form visible.

steps.description: Click the "Logout" button in the header

title: Logout from Appointments page redirects to Login
description: Verifies logout works from a secondary dashboard route and redirects to /login.

steps.description: Click the "Logout" button in the header

title: Logout from Prescriptions page redirects to Login
description: Verifies logout works from the Prescriptions dashboard route and returns the user to the login page.

steps.description: Click the "Logout" button in the header

title: Logout from Availability page redirects to Login (doctor role if available)
description: Verifies logout can be initiated from the Availability page and returns to the login screen.

steps.description: Click the "Logout" button in the header

title: Logout from Reception dashboard redirects to Login (receptionist role if available)
description: Verifies logout works from the receptionist dashboard route and returns to login.

steps.description: Click the "Logout" button in the header
